summary.description: A summary of the text file

keywords.description: A list of key terms or phrases extracted from the text

language.description: The detected primary language of the text

numLines.description: The total number of lines in the text

numWords.description: The total number of words in the text

numCharacters.description: The total number of characters in the text

avgSentenceLength.description: The average number of words per sentence

numParagraphs.description: The total number of paragraphs in the text

fleschKincaidGrade.description: The Flesch-Kincaid readability grade level score of the text
